## Summary

<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## Type

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] chore: maintenance
- [ ] docs: documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --features lang-swift,lang-kotlin,lang-dart` passes (if touching parser)
- [ ] No `unwrap()`/`expect()` in library code
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
